message:
fix(ci): build binary before running tests

Integration tests require the compiled binary to exist. Add a build
step before running tests to ensure the binary is available on all
platforms including Windows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -55,6 +55,9 @@ jobs:
         with:
           key: ${{ matrix.os }}
 
+      - name: Build binary for integration tests
+        run: cargo build
+
       - name: Run unit tests
         run: cargo test --verbose
